TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit AIAssistantsClientBuilderExtensions extends System.Object

Docs.summary: Extension methods to add to client builder.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.Core.Extensions.IAzureClientBuilder<Azure.AI.Assistants.AssistantsClient,Azure.AI.Assistants.AssistantsClientOptions> AddAssistantsClient<TBuilder> (this TBuilder builder, Uri endpoint, string subscriptionId, string resourceGroupName, string projectName) where TBuilder : Azure.Core.Extensions.IAzureClientFactoryBuilderWithCredential;

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.Core.Extensions.IAzureClientBuilder`2<class Azure.AI.Assistants.AssistantsClient, class Azure.AI.Assistants.AssistantsClientOptions> AddAssistantsClient<(class Azure.Core.Extensions.IAzureClientFactoryBuilderWithCredential) TBuilder>(!!TBuilder builder, class System.Uri endpoint, string subscriptionId, string resourceGroupName, string projectName) cil managed

<Extension()> Public Function AddAssistantsClient(Of TBuilder As IAzureClientFactoryBuilderWithCredential) (builder As TBuilder, endpoint As Uri, subscriptionId As String, resourceGroupName As String, projectName As String) As IAzureClientBuilder(Of AssistantsClient, AssistantsClientOptions)

static member AddAssistantsClient : 'Builder * Uri * string * string * string -> Azure.Core.Extensions.IAzureClientBuilder<Azure.AI.Assistants.AssistantsClient, Azure.AI.Assistants.AssistantsClientOptions> (requires 'Builder :> Azure.Core.Extensions.IAzureClientFactoryBuilderWithCredential)

Docs.param: The Azure AI Foundry project endpoint, in the form `https://<azure-region>.api.azureml.ms` or `https://<private-link-guid>.<azure-region>.api.azureml.ms`, where <azure-region> is the Azure region where the project is deployed (e.g. westus) and <private-link-guid> is the GUID of the Enterprise private link.
The name of the Azure Resource Group.
The Azure AI Foundry project name.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.Core.Extensions.IAzureClientBuilder<Azure.AI.Assistants.AssistantsClient,Azure.AI.Assistants.AssistantsClientOptions> AddAssistantsClient<TBuilder> (this TBuilder builder, Uri endpoint, string subscriptionId, string resourceGroupName, string projectName, Azure.AzureKeyCredential credential) where TBuilder : Azure.Core.Extensions.IAzureClientFactoryBuilder;

<Extension()> Public Function AddAssistantsClient(Of TBuilder As IAzureClientFactoryBuilder) (builder As TBuilder, endpoint As Uri, subscriptionId As String, resourceGroupName As String, projectName As String, credential As AzureKeyCredential) As IAzureClientBuilder(Of AssistantsClient, AssistantsClientOptions)

static member AddAssistantsClient : 'Builder * Uri * string * string * string * Azure.AzureKeyCredential -> Azure.Core.Extensions.IAzureClientBuilder<Azure.AI.Assistants.AssistantsClient, Azure.AI.Assistants.AssistantsClientOptions> (requires 'Builder :> Azure.Core.Extensions.IAzureClientFactoryBuilder)

Docs.param: The Azure AI Foundry project endpoint, in the form `https://<azure-region>.api.azureml.ms` or `https://<private-link-guid>.<azure-region>.api.azureml.ms`, where <azure-region> is the Azure region where the project is deployed (e.g. westus) and <private-link-guid> is the GUID of the Enterprise private link.
The name of the Azure Resource Group.
The Azure AI Foundry project name.
A credential used to authenticate to an Azure Service.
